title: Bank of England does not need to hike interest rates, says IMF — it may even need to cut
summary_full: The Bank of England is expected to hold and even potentially hike interest rates this year in response to resurgent inflation sparked by the Iran war.
summary_public: The Bank of England is expected to hold and even potentially hike interest rates this year in response to resurgent inflation sparked by the Iran war.
